skill_targets.title: acme-api-gateway-onboarding
skill_targets.rationale: Acme's API Gateway handles OAuth 2.0 token exchange and webhook registration with a non-standard scope format that generic OAuth libraries do not handle correctly.
skill_targets.differentiation_hypothesis: Agents without this skill fail to construct valid scope strings for Acme's gateway, causing 403 errors that appear to be permission issues rather than format mismatches.
skill_targets.existing_competition: Generic OAuth2 docs do not cover Acme's compound scope syntax.
skill_targets.agentic_landscape: AI-assisted enterprise integration is growing; agents are increasingly asked to configure API connections
